exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.reason: Heavy horizontal press with a stable setup and simple progression.
execution_notes: Lower with control and pause briefly at the bottom.
Leave 1 to 2 reps in reserve on every set.

alternatives.name: Dumbbell Bench Press with Neutral Grip
alternatives.note: Use this if shoulders feel better with a neutral hand position.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Rows
exercises.reason: Simple horizontal pull to balance the pressing volume.
execution_notes: Pause the squeeze for one beat.

alternatives.name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
alternatives.note: Use this if the cable station is busy.
